prompt: Create a luxurious square product advertisement for a premium perfume bottle named AZURE NOIR. The scene shows a reflective chrome-silver cylindrical perfume bottle floating diagonally in midair, tilted slightly left-to-right, with a black glossy cap and polished metal collar. The front label is minimal and centered with a tiny starburst emblem above the text, the perfume name in elegant serif capitals, and small text reading “EAU DE PARFUM” below. Surround the bottle with exactly 24 discrete floating elements: 8 faceted clear crystal diamonds of different sizes, 14 small chrome/glass water droplets or metallic spheres, and 2 translucent satin ribbon arcs curling around the bottle in a loose spiral. Use a dramatic blue-to-warm-gold gradient background resembling a twilight ocean horizon, with a soft spotlight from the upper left, a warm sunset glow near the lower right horizon, and glossy water reflections at the bottom. Make the bottle highly reflective with crisp highlights, realistic caustics, premium cosmetic photography lighting, shallow depth of field, and a sleek high-end fragrance campaign aesthetic. Leave no extra text besides the bottle label, no logo watermark, no hands, no people.
